USMC Honors the life of General Michael J. Williams, 28th Assistant Commandant of the Marine Corps

The United States Marine Corps honored the life and service of the 28th Assistant Commandant of the Marine Corps, General Michael J. Williams, USMC (Ret.), with a graveside burial with full military honors on Thursday, December 18, 2025, at the National Memorial Cemetery at Quantico.
The family will receive condolences at the following address:
In lieu of flowers, the family requests that a charitable donation be made to the "National Military Family Association" through Raymond Funeral Home.
All Marine Corps installations within the National Capital Region displayed the National Ensign at half-mast on December 18, 2025, from the beginning of the funeral until sunset.
Gen Williams’ biography is availablehere. The obituary is available on theRaymond Funeral Home webpage.
Media seeking additional information should contact Marine Corps Communication Directorate atOnTheRecord@usmc.mil.
